<?php namespace Illuminate\Queue\Console; use Illuminate\Console\Command; use Illuminate\Queue\Failed\PrunableFailedJobProvider; use Illuminate\Support\Carbon; use Symfony\Component\Console\Attribute\AsCommand; #[AsCommand(name: 'queue:prune-failed')] class PruneFailedJobsCommand extends Command { /** * The console command signature. * * @var string */ protected $signature = 'queue:prune-failed {--hours=24 : The number of hours to retain failed jobs data}'; /** * The console command description. * * @var string */ protected $description = 'Prune stale entries from the failed jobs table'; /** * Execute the console command. * * @return int|null */ public function handle() { $failer = $this->laravel['queue.failer']; if ($failer instanceof PrunableFailedJobProvider) { $count = $failer->prune(Carbon::now()->subHours($this->option('hours'))); } else { $this->components->error('The ['.class_basename($failer).'] failed job storage driver does not support pruning.'); return 1; } $this->components->info("{$count} entries deleted."); } }
